conditions: Only minimized, consented, deletion-checked records admitted by a separately active frozen protocol may leave the private store.
Notes, photos, precise coordinates, account identifiers, reporter secrets, and social identity remain excluded.
The exact official export, query, retrieval time, checksum, dictionary, sampling design, license, and intended use must be receipted before normalization.
Normalization is not authorization for model training, validation, or production scoring.
Only the exact receipted official aggregate snapshot may be used as descriptive block-and-period context.
The source cannot become a point label, complete attempt, species-specific target-effort denominator, model-training row, validation row, or production-scoring input.
Only the exact receipted official aggregate snapshot may be used as descriptive block-and-period context.
The source cannot become a point label, complete attempt, California-halibut target-effort denominator, model-training row, validation row, or production-scoring input.
The exact official asset, source metadata, checksum, CRS, datum, uncertainty or quality bands, license, and access date must be receipted before use.
Unlabeled terrain pretraining cannot measure or claim catch-prediction skill.

A passing raw whole-source screen does not authorize source-accuracy admission, raster alignment, model training, validation, promotion, production scoring, or deployment.

A passing support screen does not authorize raster alignment, model training, validation, promotion, production scoring, or deployment.

Endpoint-support-footprint use is limited to exact CRS, transform, shape, and bounds checks without reading raster pixels or authorizing labels, training, validation, production scoring, or deployment.
Synthetic data is limited to deterministic tests and smoke checks.
Synthetic rows and artifacts are never production evidence.
